question_text: What does the efficiency of a device tell us?

options.label: A
options.text: How much energy the device uses in total

options.label: B
options.text: How much of the input energy is converted into useful energy

options.label: C
options.text: How long the device will last before breaking

options.label: D
options.text: How much the device costs to buy

explanation: Efficiency measures what fraction of the total energy input becomes useful energy output. The rest is wasted, usually as heat. This helps us understand how well a device converts energy.
